message.entry: AXIS(''STATE'') is obsolete and will be eliminated in future versions. Use GET(GCA,...) instead.
Command option {0} is only available for Cartesian axes.
Command option {0} is only available for numeric axes.
x-axis and y-axis limits have different data types. Use xlim and ylim functions instead.
x-axis, y-axis and z-axis limits have different data types. Use xlim, ylim and zlim functions instead.
First argument must be an Axes object.
